description: Welcome to this beautifully updated 3 bed, 3 bath end unit offering space, style, & an unbeatable location. The fully renovated kitchen features updated cabinetry, countertops, modern backsplash, s/s appliances, & pot lights, all flowing seamlessly into a spacious dining room with matching custom built-in cabinets. Outside you'll find a large patio & yard, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. All bathrooms showcase updated flooring & contemporary vanities. The main floor offers a convenient powder room & a laundry room with added storage. Upstairs you’ll find three generous bedrooms & two full baths. Fresh paint throughout the home. Only a short walk to shops, restaurants, brewery, schools, parks, trails, & the West Coast Express—an ideal place to call home! Open House Sun Feb 22 3-5pm!
